footer.tagline: Writer and critic based in Bucharest. Mostly film and TV.

home.heroTagline: Aspiring writer and critic focused on Film and Television.
home.heroIntro: I am passionate about analyzing and deciphering the secrets of cinema that define our perception as viewers. With an interest in writing, my goal is to explore the ways of cinema and to become a part of it as a writer and director.
home.featuredSubtitle: Video essays and longer pieces on film. More on the way.
home.quote: Cinema is a matter of what's in the frame and what's out.
home.ctaSubtitle: Freelance piece, commission, or you just watched something strange and want to swap notes. Either way, send a message.

about.title: In short
about.bio1: I am Cojocari Sergiu, an aspiring writer and content creator with a strong passion towards films and tv series from all around the globe. With a focus towards storytelling, I try to understand how cinema works and share my opinions in the form of video essays.
about.bio2: Based in Bucharest, Romania, I'm deeply passionate about the different cultures and identities that make up cinema as a whole. Through my work I hope to show some insight into the craft of cinema and into why it is so important for humanity as a way of expressing one's perspective on the world we live in.
about.bio3: I am also open to other opportunities as I take a big interest in script writing and video editing, constantly learning and practicing in these fields.
about.valuesSubtitle: Rough rules I try to stick to.
about.value1Desc: Honest is fine; mean for sport is not. I write the way I'd explain the film to a friend at the kitchen table.
about.value2Desc: The stuff I come back to rarely sits in one genre box. I like writing that admits the mess instead of smoothing it away.
about.value3Desc: Budget, language, who's in the room when it screens: all of that shapes what you see. I don't treat those as off limits.
about.value4Desc: Hard ideas don't need hard sentences. I want someone who doesn't read theory for fun to still get the point.

projects.pageSubtitle: Movie reviews and video essays. Filter below if you know what you're after.

1.title: Ghostlight - How to Cope With The Loss of a Loved One
1.description: An analysis on the 2024 film "Ghostlight" and the way it copes with the loss of a loved one.

2.title: Why is Lumon Torturing Gemma Scout?
2.description: A discussion on the content of the first 2 seasons of "Severance" and a prediction on the content of the next season.

3.title: Nothingness on the Screen
3.description: An analysis on the way that Asian values and filming techniques enrich the western way of moviemaking.

4.title: The Art of Profiling - Mindhunter
4.description: A video essay about the skills Holden Ford and Bill Tench learn from the U.S.' biggest criminals that helped them secure a confession from the killer Gene Devier.

contact.title: Let's Work Together
contact.subtitle: Open to freelance writing, video work, and collaborations that actually fit.
contact.infoText: Film writing, video, help with a script, or something you can't quite label yet. Send a note and we'll see if it lines up.
contact.thankYouSub: I'll get back to you soon.
